scope_boundary: Local-first pre-stable hardening; no collaboration, accounts, remote storage, provider integration, OAuth, analytics, or new analytical lens.

confirmed_defects.summary: Strategic draft and resolution validation was shallow despite claiming whole-document validation.
confirmed_defects.control: Generated JSON Schema validator plus duplicate-ID, reference-integrity, and safe-URL checks.

confirmed_defects.summary: Focused textarea input could bypass dirty guards and be lost during close, reload, or section navigation.
confirmed_defects.control: Raw pending input participates in guards and is applied before navigation, save, undo, and redo.

confirmed_defects.summary: The Strategic no-source prompt emitted evidence_strength 0 while the schema requires 1 through 5.
Workspace status did not distinguish persistent storage, best effort, quota pressure, or unsupported measurement.
confirmed_defects.control: StorageManager health inspection, user-initiated persistence request, and explicit backup guidance.

residual_risks.impact: Immutable history exists without practical recovery
Unrecoverable local rows can block user recovery
Old exports may be mistaken for current protection
Stuck pending UI and weak diagnostics
Automated checks cannot prove linguistic or assistive quality

stable_release_blockers: Complete browser, visual, CI, and deployed-production authority
Human Arabic, French, assistive-technology, and epistemic sign-off
